name: rsalgo
description: fast running algorithms for .js/.ts written in rust

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run watch:rust" "npm run test:rust:watch" "npm run watch:js" "npm run test:js:watch:min"
scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build algorithms --target nodejs && mkdir -p src/generated && cp algorithms/pkg/algorithms* src/generated/
scripts.watch:rust: cd algorithms && cargo watch -s "wasm-pack build --target nodejs && mkdir -p ../src/generated && cp pkg/algorithms* ../src/generated/"
scripts.test:rust:watch: cd algorithms && cargo watch -w src -w tests -x check -x test

author: David Kontrovitz

templateMeta.overridesNote: overrides patch known transitive vulnerabilities; safe within same major; remove once upstream ranges are updated.
